title: Do Everything!
description: A modpack designed to introduce decoration, adventure, and technical Minecraft all in one!
body:
# Do Everything Modpack

## Features
### Improved World Generation
- World generation is done with the help of both [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) and [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored). The nether is amplified thanks to the help of [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether), and the End is made more exciting thanks to [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape). 
### Additional Structures
- There is plenty of adventure thanks to mods such as [DungeonZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz) and [Adventure Z](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez) add a lot of dungeon crawling to the world.
- [Repurposed Structures ](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric) and [Yung's Mod Series](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) enhance vanilla structures to make them feel more alive.
- Some other mods to note are [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) as well as [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem), which changes the progression to reach the End dimension.
### Decoration
- Decoration mods in this pack include [Clutter](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutter), [Furnish](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnish-furniture), and [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), these mods give a lot of decoration potential
- Create funny pictures or beautiful art with [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings)
- Make new foods for your home with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
## Known Issues
There are some issues that you may run into while using this pack, so below is a list of known issues and what you can do to prevent them.
- Random FPS spikes after loading many new chunks. If this happens to you, you can restart your game, or increase your installation memory allocation to somewhere over 4GB, which will reduce the issue.
- Create's moving chests will crash a server or your game if you are looking in their GUI when they turn into a normal chest
- Furnish chairs sometimes do not properly work on servers


## Have fun with this modpack!
